title: Construction of Chapter
doc_html:
§391.  Construction of Chapter

Nothing in this Chapter shall abrogate or affect any provisions of the public health laws, the state sanitary code, or any local health ordinance or regulation.  

Acts 1964, No. 309, §1.  Acts 1984, No. 238, §1.
doc_text:
§391.  Construction of Chapter
Nothing in this Chapter shall abrogate or affect any provisions of the public health laws, the state sanitary code, or any local health ordinance or regulation.
Acts 1964, No. 309, §1.  Acts 1984, No. 238, §1.
